section.title: Welcome to PreTeXt.Plus!
section.p:
This is a sample project to get you started. You can edit this content using the PreTeXt markup language.
\left|\sum_{i=0}^n a_i\right|\leq\sum_{i=0}^n|a_i|

statement.p: For more information on how to use PreTeXt, please use the Help menu above.

section.p: Feel free to delete this sample content and start creating your own project. Happy writing!
